intent: No-motion dummy task that stays active briefly so TSKSTATUS can prove the running-task path.

safety.notes: This program does not move, write IO, write registers, call programs, or touch system variables. It only waits long enough to be observed as running.

verification.notes: Run only as the target of A_TSKRUN. It should remain active long enough for TSKSTATUS to report R[91]=200.
